title: VSaveImage Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VSaveImage (Sequence As String, Path As String)
parameters:
Sequence	String containing the name of a sequence in the current EPSON RC+ project.

Path	Full path name of the file to save the model to, excluding the extension.
description: Save a vision video window to a PC disk file.
notes: When VSaveImage is executed, EPSON RC+ creates an image file in the specified path and file name. The file extension must be BMP (default format for Vision Guide), TIF, or JPG.
examples:
Dim found as Boolean
m_spel.VRun("Seq")
m_spel.VGet("Seq", SpelVisionProps.AllFound, found)
If Not found Then
   m_spel.VSaveImage(seq01, "d:\reject.bmp")
End If
